title: Jaden's Nether Expansion Delight
description: Adds 30+ foods, linking Jaden's Nether Expansion and Farmer's Delight in a Vanilla style.
body: ## 📜 Essence This mod adds 30+ unique food items and recipes, bringing together Jaden’s Nether Expansion and Farmer’s Delight in one seamless experience. It keeps the vanilla vibe but spices things up with Nether-themed cooking. ## 🎯 Features - 30+ new food items based on Nether biomes, mobs, and resources. - Full support for Farmer’s Delight: cutting, cooking, crafting. - Balanced food stats that fit into vanilla survival. - Exotic Nether ingredients: Glowcheese, Hogham Meat, Wisp Essence. - From light snacks to big meals: dumplings, pies, burgers. ## 📝 Description Jaden’s Nether Expansion Delight connects two amazing mods: Jaden’s Nether Expansion and Farmer’s Delight. It introduces over 30 new food items inspired by the strange beauty of the Nether. You’ll find and harvest unique resources like Wisp Custard, Glowcheese, and Nightspores, then turn them into tasty, useful meals. ![](https://imgur.com/8fZY8TD.png) Everything is designed to fit Minecraft’s vanilla style while making the Nether more rewarding. From frying Hogham Slices to baking Wisp Pies, every recipe uses familiar cooking steps but brings new depth. Whether you need a quick snack like Ochre Cookies or a full meal like Nether Hamburgers, this mod has something to boost your survival and gameplay. ### Nether Twist When you eat any dish from JNED while in the Nether, you’ll gain two random immunity effects. The immunity system itself has been improved: if a certain immunity is active, you can no longer receive the corresponding effect at all. On top of that, most dishes now come with small unique traits of their own — subtle, but meaningful. ## 🙏 Credits - Big thanks to [Jaden’s Nether Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion) team for their awesome work — this add-on wouldn’t exist without their mod. - Huge respect to [Farmer’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) creators for making Minecraft’s food system so fun and flexible. - Special thanks to Ext_Ramen496 for the Chinese language support ❤️ - Special thanks to Skff1 for the Russian language support ❤️ - Shoutout to all community who helped me catch bugs. ## 🗒️ Notes - The idea to create this mod came from Jaden’s Nether Expansion. I really liked their style and how they changed the Nether, but I’m also a big fan of Farmer’s Delight. So the idea of adding more food to Jaden’s Nether Expansion just felt right in my head — and that’s how this mod was born. - For the Fabric version, someone asked me to release an update — so I did. Fabric feels kinda tricky to me (or maybe it’s just my view), so updates there might come slower because development is harder.
